rationale: The two paper notes indicate largely nonoverlapping constructs: the citing paper is about uptrend norm messaging for health behaviors, while the cited paper is about combinatory product recommendations signaling adviser expertise. The matched evidence provides only a DOI match (no citation sentence, title, or contextual text) and no indication that the cited work is used as a core theory, mechanism, or method source in the citing paper. Given this, the pair looks more like an incidental/background mention than a substantive dependency.
